raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The advent of increasing home delivery of goods has benefitted consumers, retailers, and the economy.",
    "There has been an increase in theft of packages from outside Californians’ homes, termed 'porch piracy.'",
    "Current law treats theft of packages from porches as a misdemeanor regardless of repeat offenses.",
    "Senate Bill 979 would allow prosecution of repeat offenders as a felony after a third conviction within 36 months.",
    "Increasing penalties for package theft may reduce the frequency of these crimes.",
    "Theft of packages drives up prices for consumers and increases insurance rates."
  ]
}
```
